title: MGU Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) Veterinarian Notification 2026 has been released on the official website mgu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MGU Veterinarian Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Veterinary Science and registered with Kerala Veterinary Council, or retired Veterinary Doctors.
qualification.details: Degree in Veterinary Science Registered with Kerala Veterinary Council Retired Veterinary Doctors are also eligible | Experience: Not specified, but experience certificate is required.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date via email. The selection is temporary and does not entitle the candidate to regular appointment.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MGU Veterinarian post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Veterinarian post at Mahatma Gandhi University is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications for the Veterinarian position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Veterinarian post, candidates must hold a Degree in Veterinary Science and be registered with the Kerala Veterinary Council. Retired Veterinary Doctors are also encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Veterinarian role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Veterinarian position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month. This is a contract-based position for a period of one year.

faq.question: Q4. How should I apply for the MGU Veterinarian recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Interested candidates need to send their application along with scanned PDF copies of relevant certificates and biodata to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Veterinarian post. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates or clarifications regarding fees.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Veterinarian post?
faq.answer: Mahatma Gandhi University is recruiting for a total of 1 vacancy for the Veterinarian position. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Veterinarian position at Mahatma Gandhi University is a contract-based job for a period of one year. It is a temporary appointment and does not guarantee regular employment.

faq.question: Q8. Will shortlisted candidates be informed about the interview?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be notified about the interview date and time via email. It is crucial to provide a valid and active email address in your application.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested, scanned PDF copies of their educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), identity proof, and biodata with their email application.

faq.question: Q10. Can retired Veterinary Doctors apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, retired Veterinary Doctors are eligible to apply for the Veterinarian post at Mahatma Gandhi University, provided they meet the other specified criteria.
